allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; lines=sys.stdin.read\(\); import re; d=json.loads\(re.search\('\\{.*\\}',lines,re.S\).group\(\)\); print\('status:', d.get\('instance',{}\).get\('status'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('connect response:', d\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f\).read\(\), f\) for f in ['app/config.py','app/services/whatsapp_cloud_api.py','app/api/webhooks.py','app/api/settings.py','app/api/conversations.py','app/models/schemas.py','main.py']]")
